title: Firework Rocket Duration
description: Adds texture variations to firework rockets, depending on their flight duration value
body:
# Firework Rocket Duration

Adds texture variations to firework rockets, depending on their flight duration value.

before:

![vanilla minecraft rockets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/endI0Fuo/images/3ad8759773824dce6633f370164771effd13ab3a.png)
![vanilla minecraft rockets multiple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/endI0Fuo/images/9b826afd824319d2a97099099dcf0bc015aba724.png)

after:

![resourse pack rockets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/endI0Fuo/images/0dc403cafda595f5e70860458cb5eee86056dc66.png)
![resourse pack rockets multiple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/endI0Fuo/images/444c295f2037ae0f73b2798ac026e5442a60f044.png)
